description_long: This is a modern flat-screen television with a wide, rectangular display and a slim profile. The front features a large, blue-tinted screen surrounded by a thin, black bezel, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The television is supported by a V-shaped stand that extends outward, providing stability and a minimalistic look. The back of the unit is solid black with subtle geometric lines, and the stand is attached centrally. The side views reveal the television's ultra-thin depth, emphasizing its lightweight and space-saving design. No visible buttons, ports, or branding are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A slim, modern flat-screen television with a wide blue-tinted display, thin black bezel, and a V-shaped stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large blue-tinted screen, thin black bezel, and V-shaped stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile and the depth of the V-shaped stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back panel and the central attachment of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again showing the slim profile and stand depth.
attribute_bezel_design: thin black bezel, matte finish, minimalistic styling
